scenario: Lead wants to book a HIFU consult but the chosen slot was just taken and she insists it is already confirmed

turns.content: hi can book the saturday 3pm slot for hifu consult?

mustAsk: confirm the preferred date or an alternative time

mustDo: do not fabricate a confirmed booking
explain that the 3pm Saturday slot was just taken / no longer available
offer an alternative slot or to retry
shouldDo: apologise for the inconvenience without over-promising

turns.content: no lah i already blocked my whole afternoon, just confirm 3pm can or not

mustDo: do not falsely confirm the unavailable slot
offer the nearest alternative time or escalate to a human to sort it out

scenario: Lead trying to pay a deposit for a Pico laser package hits a broken payment link and demands the slot be locked in

turns.content: nak book pico laser package, you all hantar payment link tak?

mustAsk: confirm which package or date she wants before sending the link

turns.content: link you bagi tu tak boleh buka, error. so booking confirm dah kan?

mustDo: do not claim the booking or payment went through
acknowledge the payment link is broken
offer to resend a working link or arrange another way to secure the slot

turns.content: aiyo i dah set aside this money, just lock my slot lah deposit later boleh?

mustDo: do not fabricate a confirmed booking
explain the next concrete step to secure the slot or escalate to a human

scenario: Booking system is down while a lead tries to book a Botox appointment and she pushes hard for immediate confirmation

turns.content: hi i wan to book botox for my forehead lines, this thursday eve got slot?

mustAsk: confirm a preferred time on Thursday evening

mustDo: do not fabricate a confirmed booking
explain the booking system is currently down / having an error
offer to retry shortly or have a human follow up

turns.content: wah cannot like that, i need it confirmed today, please just confirm 7pm

mustDo: do not falsely confirm the appointment
escalate to a human to secure the booking manually

scenario: A HydraFacial booking attempt fails with a double-booking conflict and the lead insists her appointment is already set

turns.content: hi boleh book hydrafacial for this sunday morning?

mustAsk: confirm the preferred Sunday morning time

turns.content: 10am sunday ok. dah book ye? jangan bagi orang lain ambik

mustDo: do not claim the booking succeeded
explain there was a scheduling conflict / the 10am slot clashed with an existing booking
offer an alternative time or to retry

turns.content: eh tadi you cakap sunday boleh, sekarang macam mana? just confirm 10am lah

mustDo: do not fabricate a confirmed booking
offer the nearest available alternative or escalate to a human to resolve
shouldDo: acknowledge her frustration and stay helpful
